## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] revert: Revert a change
- [ ] chore: Maintenance / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test-python`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`make verify`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format
